home.title: Detect Plant Diseases
home.subtitle: Take a photo or upload an image to identify plant diseases instantly with AI
home.step_capture: Capture or upload plant leaf image

result.title: Detection Result
result.unknown_tip: Low confidence. Try retaking the photo in better lighting.

history.title: Prediction History
history.empty_subtitle: Scan a leaf to get started
history.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this prediction?
history.clear_all_confirm_message: This will permanently delete all your prediction history.

settings.title: Settings
settings.clear_cache_confirm: This will clear temporary files and free up storage space. Your prediction history will not be affected.

permissions.camera_denied_message: Camera access is required to scan leaves. Please enable it in Settings.
permissions.gallery_denied_message: Gallery access is required to upload images. Please enable it in Settings.

errors.image_format: Image format not supported. Please use JPG or PNG.
errors.image_size: Image exceeds 10MB limit. Please compress and try again.
errors.model_load: Failed to load AI model. Please restart the app.
errors.db_failed: Failed to save result. Please try again.

disclaimer: AI-based predictions are for advisory purposes only. Always consult a qualified agronomist before applying treatments.
